name: <OnEthPacket>
title: <OnEthPacket>
syntax: void <OnEthPacket>( long channel, long dir, long packet);
description: The function is called when a registered Ethernet packet is received.
Within this callback function the following functions can be used to retrieve the received packet data:
The functions access the payload of the highest interpretable protocol. Offset 0 starts at the beginning of the payload.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Ethernet channel on which the packet was received
